hero.subtitle: Where design thinking meets human connection
hero.description: Digital transformation designer, art therapist, and lifelong learner — bridging business, technology, and creativity.
about.title: About me
about.intro: Based in Bratislava, working across Central Europe. Over 15 years of experience at the intersection of business, technology, design, and art.
about.story: At The Estée Lauder Companies, I led global digital transformation projects. At Be-novative startup, I spent 7 years building an innovation platform. Along the way, I discovered the world of art therapy. Today, I weave these threads together: design thinking, technology, and human connection.
about.languages: Languages: Hungarian (native), Slovak (C2), English (C1), Czech (B1), German (A2)
experience.title: Experience
exp.elc.role: Digital Project, Technical Product & Transformation Manager
exp.elc.company: The Estée Lauder Companies — OneSource GBS
exp.elc.desc: Leading global transformation projects. Salesforce Service Cloud technical product management, AI integration (Copilot, Leena AI), manufacturing ecosystem redesign across 9 plants (APAC, EMEA, AM), knowledge management, and process optimization.
exp.gap.desc: An inspiration period with travels and discoveries. Participating in a career change program — exploring how to combine my business, technology, design, and art/well-being background.
exp.benovative.role: Customer Development & Success, Innovation Consultant, Product Manager
exp.benovative.desc: 7 years building an innovation and design thinking-based SaaS platform. From business development to customer success and product management. Webflow design, global client projects, Superflow MVP development from scratch.
exp.genertel.desc: Founding team member of Genertel Slovakia. Insurance product development and market launch (MTPL, Casco, Household), innovation management platform implementation, back-office process building.
education.title: Education
edu.claude: Claude AI Code Basics — AI Budapest
edu.dataviz: Data Visualization & Data Storytelling — MOME Open
edu.arttherapy: Art Therapy — Hungarian Art and Sociotherapeutic Community Building Association
edu.master: Company Management MSc & BSc — J. Selye University
projects.title: Projects
project.momo.title: MOMO Art Therapy
project.momo.desc: Personal project in art therapy and mental well-being. Individual and group sessions supporting self-knowledge, personal growth, and creative processes. Member of the Hungarian Art and Sociotherapeutic Community Building Association.
project.bookworm.title: Könyvmolyok / Bookworm
project.bookworm.desc: Community project about conscious reading and the joy of literature. Nearly 3,000 followers through organic growth. The page later shifted its focus toward art, therapy, and mental well-being.
project.volunteer.title: Mentoring & Volunteering
project.volunteer.desc: Mentor and art therapist at Engame Academy, Grund Organization, and Konnekt Nonprofit. Program coordinator at Hungarian House of Music for Ukrainian refugees. Cultural manager, Brain Bar, and more.
newsletter.title: Stay in touch
newsletter.desc: Subscribe to my newsletter for insights on design thinking, art therapy, digital transformation, and personal growth.
form.lang_pref: In which language would you like the newsletter?
form.privacy: Your data is handled securely and will never be shared with third parties.
